findings.title: Stalled Reminder Wave
findings.why: Reminder 1 was scheduled to be sent on 2026-06-01 but is still in 'scheduled' status. This indicates a potential issue with the automated reminder system.
findings.do: Investigate and manually send Reminder 1 to ensure guests are reminded.

findings.title: Pending Households with Reminder Cap Exhausted
findings.why: The Levi Family (L2) has reached the reminder cap of 3 and still has a pending RSVP status. Automation has reached its limit.
findings.do: Contact the Levi Family personally to confirm their attendance.

findings.title: Unreachable Household
findings.why: The Peretz household (L4) has no valid phone number and is still pending. No automated nudges can reach them.
findings.do: Use an alternative communication method to reach the Peretz household.

findings.title: Seating Drift - Declined Households Assigned
findings.why: Mizrahi Family (L3) has declined but is still assigned to Table 2. They occupy unnecessary seating capacity.
findings.do: Remove Mizrahi Family from the seating arrangement to free up space for other guests.
